title: Concentration of viruses from sewage using HA filters
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"918s7","text":"Concentration of viruses from sewage using HA filters","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":53}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"cfcf1","text":"Each sewage samples is processed in triplicate: two technical duplicates and one archive. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"9qkvs","text":"Before starting the filtration: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"711v1","text":"Clean the working area and all equipment: wipe down with 10% bleach and let stand for 10 min, then rinse with water and dry. Next, wipe down using 70% ethanol and let dry.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5093q","text":"Verify that the carboy to receive filtration waste is not full or near to be full.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"buc81","text":"Keep forceps sterile by placing them in a small beaker containing 70% ethanol.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"drddh","text":"Prepare an ice bucket.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ab3co","text":"Thaw the bovine coronavirus (BCoV) recovery control on ice. Do not thaw the same aliquot more than twice.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"63hc2","text":"Add MgCl2 stock solution in 50-mL tubes for a final concentration of 25 mM.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":8,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"h73o","text":"Add 400 µL of CTAB in each 2-mL bead beating tubes (2 tubes needed per sample).","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5k3s2","text":"When work is completed, remove equipment and supplies from the cabinet. Wipe the work area with 10% bleach, let stand for 10 min, rinse with water, then with 70% ethanol. Finally, turn on the UV lamp for 15 minutes. Empty the carboy.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gav6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3oisn","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8ob8d","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"49p3c","text":"The filtration has to be performed in a biosafety cabinet to avoid any contact with raw sewage. steps: Take the sample out from the refrigerator.
Homogenize the sample thoroughly, avoiding foaming.

Use a pipette controller, transfer 25 mL of the sample into a 50-mL tube (where MgCl 2 has been previously added 25 millimolar (mM), final concentration ). Repeat for each replicate. Save the rest of the sample at 4ºC for archive or until decontamination and disposal.
Spike in each replicate 5 µL of Bovine Coronavirus recovery control (~100,000 cp/uL), prepared as Bovine coronavirus solution prepared according to http://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bpg8mjzw
Put the 50-mL tubes on ice until further processing.
Filter the samples in the 50-mL tubes:

Rinse the clean filtration funnel with sterile deionized water. Magnetic Filter Funnel (300 mL, 47 mm, Pall, 4242, https://shop.pall.com/us/en/products/zid4242?CategoryName=ID29&CatalogID=Laboratory ) Make sure some water is still on the porous plate.

Place the HA filter in the filtration funnel. Cellulose esters filters 0.8 µm 47 mm diameter Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #AAWP04700 filter Make sure the filter gets wet due to the residual water on the porous plate.
Homogenize the sample in the 50-mL tube. Avoid as much as possible the liquid to touch the lid.

Filter the content in the 50-mL tube through a 0.80 µm 47mm cellulose ester filter at low vacuum pressure (~50 mmHg VAC). Gast DOA-P704-AA (High-Capacity Vacuum Pump, with Gauge, Regulator, and Relief, Cole-Parmer, EW-07061-40, https://www.coleparmer.com/i/gast-doa-p704-aa-high-capacity-vacuum-pump-with-gauge-regulator-and-relief-1-1-cfm-25-5-hg-115-vac/0706140 )

As soon as the filtration is complete, transfer the filter to a 2-mL ZR BashingBead Lysis Tubes containing 400 µL of CTAB buffer solution (previously added). Maxwell(R) HT Environmental TNA Kit custom Promega Catalog #AX9190 Transfer It is important not to “over-dry” the filter on the filtration system. Fold the filter as shown in Figure 1. Do not crease the filters with the forceps. Figure 1 Filter folding procedure. Step 1: fold the filter in half. Step 2: repeat that step. Step 3: Transfer to a 2-mL tube. ZR BashingBead Lysis Tubes (2mm) Zymo Research Catalog #S6003-50
Put the 2-mL tubes on ice until further processing.
Repeat Steps 6 for the other replicates. go to step #6.1
Store filters at -20ºC until all samples are processed
Store filters at -80ºC for a minimum of 1h or overnight prior to the nucleic acid extraction. Archive filters at -80ºC.
Total nucleic acid extraction - Maxwell(R) HT Environmental TNA Kit, custom (Promega) by McLellan Lab
Quantification by Droplet Digital PCR (ddPCR) by McLellan Lab
creator: McLellan Lab
